nasb.text: She lusted after their paramours, whose flesh is like the flesh of donkeys and whose issue is like the issue of horses.

esv.text: and lusted after her lovers there, whose members were like those of donkeys, and whose issue was like that of horses.

cnv.text: 她戀慕她的情人，他們的下體像驢的下體；他們射精像馬一樣。

ccb.text: 怎样与那些体壮精足、如驴似马的情人纵淫，
